sources.note: 97% of fish detected, 82% prediction accuracy; 85,000+ annotations (11,572 salmon; 73,394 pollock)
85% fewer frames needing human review; days or weeks becomes hours
Bycatch Reduction and Research Act: introduced Jan 7 2026 (Sullivan, Murkowski, Begich); revamped version reported July 17 2026

sources.outlet: USFWS via Alaska Sporting Journal, Oct 16 2024
sources.note: $200,000 USFWS Tribal Wildlife Grant, Sitka Tribe of Alaska, Redoubt Lake: 'Artificial Intelligence for Subsistence Salmon Monitoring and Management'
Yukon Chinook: 'a prolonged period of low productivity' causing hardship in the Yukon drainage
